title: podman >= 3.4.2 version generate kube does not export environment vars anymore
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug


**Description**

after version >= 3.4.2, `podman generate kube container-name` does not generate yaml file with environment vars anymore.

test with the old version like `3.4.1` it works fine.

maybe related commit:

https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/b3eaa08c5f#diff-4e2259d2c3a8a7fad49c3f395c21ebdb014f01f538ad0b4898b8d759670e38f3L450

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

with latest podman `3.4.4` version:

1.  run `sudo podman run --name gen-kube-demo --rm -ti -e FOO=bar -v /tmp/:/host_tmp alpine sh`

2.  open another terminal, run `sudo podman generate kube gen-kube-demo`

**Describe the results you received:**

```yaml
# Save the output of this file and use kubectl create -f to import
# it into Kubernetes.
#
# Created with podman-3.4.4

# NOTE: If you generated this yaml from an unprivileged and rootless podman container on an SELinux
# enabled system, check the podman generate kube man page for steps to follow to ensure that your pod/container
# has the right permissions to access the volumes added.
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  creationTimestamp: "2021-12-17T23:50:33Z"
  labels:
    app: gen-kube-demo
  name: gen-kube-demo
spec:
  containers:
  - command:
    - sh
    image: docker.io/library/alpine:latest
    name: gen-kube-demo
    securityContext:
      capabilities:
        drop:
        - CAP_MKNOD
        - CAP_NET_RAW
        - CAP_AUDIT_WRITE
    stdin: true
    tty: true
    volumeMounts:
    - mountPath: /host_tmp
      name: tmp-host-0
  volumes:
  - hostPath:
      path: /tmp
      type: Directory
    name: tmp-host-0
```



**Describe the results you expected:**

with the old `podman-3.4.1`, it exports `env` correctly:

```yaml
# Created with podman-3.4.1
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  creationTimestamp: "2021-12-17T23:50:46Z"
  labels:
    app: gen-kube-demo
  name: gen-kube-demo
spec:
  containers:
  - command:
    - sh
    env:
    - name: FOO
      value: bar
    image: docker.io/library/alpine:latest
    name: gen-kube-demo
    resources: {}
    securityContext:
      allowPrivilegeEscalation: true
      capabilities:
        drop:
        - CAP_MKNOD
        - CAP_NET_RAW
        - CAP_AUDIT_WRITE
      privileged: false
      readOnlyRootFilesystem: false
      seLinuxOptions: {}
    stdin: true
    tty: true
    volumeMounts:
    - mountPath: /host_tmp
      name: tmp-host-0
    workingDir: /
  dnsConfig: {}
  volumes:
  - hostPath:
      path: /tmp
      type: Directory
    name: tmp-host-0
status: {}
```

the diff

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/41882455/146620509-f60a6d12-9eee-4cf3-a1da-abb462bb292d.png)

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

no. the bug can re-produce.

**Output of `podman version`:**


**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/troubleshooting.md)**


Yes

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

physical
